reviews.comment:
No había empleados estaban descargando garrafas d un camión mientras tanto la cola d autos terminaron y nada un muchacho fue a buscarlos no me gustó y p colmo no podiamos salir x los coches q había malll

(Translated by Google)
There were no employees; they were unloading jugs from a truck. Meanwhile, the line of cars ended, and nothing happened. A young man went to look for them. I didn't like it, and to top it all off, we couldn't leave because of the traffic.

reviews.comment:
Cómo todo automóvil club es reconocido , pero lento tenés que ingresar a la isla de carga solo del lado que corresponde al auto bes decir si es carga derecha x derecha izquierda por izquierda no cruzan las mangueras y así una cola infernal.

(Translated by Google)
Like any automobile club, it's recognized, but slow; you have to enter the loading island only from the side that corresponds to the car, that is, if it's right loading, go right, left loading, go left, the hoses don't cross, and so on, a hellish queue.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXczczT2h3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio el del ACA en San Martín de los Andes.  Tuvimos un accidente en Quila Quina  con el auto donde se vió comprometido el radiador y el electro ventilador. El sector de Mecánica del ACA nos atendió de maravilla sin preguntarnos si éramos socios o no. Estuvieron más  de una hora trabajando hasta que lograron dejarnos el auto para  que pudiéramos viajar sin problema. Felicitamos al Mecánico y   sus  compañeros que nos atendieron tan amablemente!!  Saludos desde La Pampa!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the ACA in San Martín de los Andes. We had an accident in Quila Quina where the radiator and electric fan were damaged. The ACA's mechanics department treated us wonderfully without even asking if we were members. They worked for over an hour until they had the car ready for us so we could travel without any problems. We congratulate the mechanic and his colleagues who helped us so kindly! Greetings from La Pampa!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXNDVuMkpREAE
